steps.title: Find the radius value
steps.content:
The slant segment $AB=86$, height $43$, and radius form a right triangle. Use the Pythagorean theorem.
$$r^2+43^2=86^2$$
$$r^2=86^2-43^2=7{,}396-1{,}849=5{,}547$$

steps.title: Use cone volume
steps.content:
The cone volume formula is
$$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi r^2h$$
Substitute $r^2=5{,}547$ and $h=43$.
$$V=\frac{1}{3}\pi(5{,}547)(43)=79{,}507\pi$$

steps.title: Read k
steps.content: Since the volume is $k\pi$, the coefficient of $\pi$ is the requested value. The answer is 79507.
